ad_sets.name: IL-1B Israeli Investors - Rear Villa Hook
PH-1B Filipino Investors - Pool Villa Hook

pricing_note: Israeli content uses SHEKELS ONLY (fixed monthly, no FX recalculation). Filipino content uses PHP ONLY. Global/INTL content uses PHP primary with USD secondary.

israel.monthly_income_rule: Use PHP 395,000 for income figures. Villa prices in shekels only. Do not mix currencies.

global.note: PHP with commas primary. USD approximate with rate date secondary.

meta_lead_webhook.limitation: App is in Development mode - webhooks fire only from Admin/Developer/Tester accounts. App Review required for public traffic.
meta_lead_webhook.next_action: Submit App Review for pages_messaging permission to receive webhooks from real leads.

removed_campaigns.name: PPV - Korea Search
removed_campaigns.reason: Outside approved IL + PH scope and would exceed the approved budget plan.

google_ads.pending_upload_warning: A June 2 pending upload has 1 valid change: add Test Campaign. Do not approve it as a Panglao fix.
google_ads.note: Live Google Ads account was repaired on 2026-06-04. The existing IL and PH Search campaigns now have active ad groups, keywords, and responsive search ads. The two ads are pending Google review. Korea was paused as outside approved scope. Account currency is PHP, so budgets must be specified in PHP.

supabase.purpose: Lead capture, conversations, scoring, activities, and dashboard persistence
supabase.verified: GET /api/marketing/leads returns live data; POST /api/marketing/leads reaches validation without database configuration failure.

creative_philosophy: Clean property images - all marketing text in post copy. Market-specific currency rules: IL fixed shekels only, PH PHP primary.

blockers.impact: WhatsApp-led automation, sales alerts, and inbound lead routing are not production-ready.
blockers.next_action: Complete WATI setup or define manual WhatsApp handoff before scaling lead volume.

blockers.blocker: Meta App in Development mode - webhooks only from test accounts
blockers.impact: Webhook is verified and subscriptions active, but the Meta App is in Development mode. Only Admin/Developer/Tester accounts trigger webhooks. Real leads from ads will NOT trigger auto-responses until App Review is approved.
blockers.next_action: Submit App Review for pages_messaging permission in Meta Developers console. This enables webhook events from all public users.

blockers.blocker: Google Ads ads pending review and budgets are minimal
blockers.impact: Google Ads structure is repaired, but the two responsive search ads are pending Google review and live daily budget is only PHP 22/day across IL and PH.
blockers.next_action: Wait for Google ad review, then verify impressions. Budget increases require explicit approval because they change live spend.

blockers.blocker: Meta reports zero leads despite high click volume
blockers.impact: 444K impressions, 13K clicks, 0 leads. Form endpoint was fixed but zero leads persist.
blockers.next_action: Verify Meta lead form is configured in campaign, check Pixel fire on form submit, test end-to-end lead capture.

blockers.blocker: Hebrew community posts Brand Guard hold - LIFTED
blockers.impact: Currency conflict resolved (ILS_ONLY for Israel per CLAUDE.md). Posts can now be validated and published.
blockers.how: Fixed campaign_state.json to ILS_ONLY for Israeli content, aligning with CLAUDE.md Rule 1.

resolved_blockers.blocker: Facebook Page not linked to Ad Account

resolved_blockers.how: Bar settled balance in Meta Business Settings
Creatives uploaded and attached to ads
User confirmed production Meta token and live campaign connection
User confirmed Supabase is connected in production
Updated remaining contact and booking forms to /api/marketing/leads and only fire Lead events after successful persistence

resolved_blockers.blocker: Google Ads campaigns had no ad groups
resolved_blockers.how: Approved bulk uploads that added IL/PH ad groups, keywords, and responsive search ads; paused Korea campaign.

resolved_blockers.blocker: Meta Lead Webhook verify token missing
resolved_blockers.how: Set META_WEBHOOK_VERIFY_TOKEN in Vercel, verified endpoint returns challenge, subscribed to messages+messaging_postbacks+feed in Meta Developers

community_agent.posting_schedule: Calendar-driven: Sun-Thu only, 8-10 PM Israel time. See _queue/community-agent/calendar.md
